name: I missed some work before realizing my rash was occupational—claim still good?
description: Yes, report within 180 days of awareness.[6]

mainEntity.name: I missed some work before realizing my rash was occupational—claim still good?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, report within 180 days of awareness.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if you report within 180 days and prove work link; prior absences don't bar if not reported then.[6] Utah allows claims post-realization under ODA.[6] Key factors: prompt reporting after knowledge, evidence of progression. Explain delays medically, file fully documented. Many succeed despite gaps.
